hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our secured business loans — answered honestly.

items.a: Prayaan Capital is an RBI-registered NBFC focused on AI-powered secured business loans for small business owners across India, with a focus on Tier 3–6 cities.

items.q: Are you regulated by the RBI?
items.a: Yes. Prayaan Capital is registered as an NBFC under the Reserve Bank of India. Our certificate of registration is publicly disclosed under RBI Disclosures.

items.q: What loan amounts can I get?
items.a: We offer secured business loans from ₹5L to ₹50L, depending on the property value and your repayment capacity.

items.q: Do I need to mortgage my property?
items.a: Yes — our loans are secured against your property. This is what allows us to offer you lower interest rates starting from 16% p.a.

items.q: What is the minimum CIBIL score?
items.a: We look beyond CIBIL. Our AI model evaluates property value, bank flow, and repayment history — a score of 680+ improves your pricing.

items.q: What types of property are accepted?
items.a: Residential, commercial and industrial properties with clear, marketable title. The property should be self-occupied or rented and registered in your name.
Most decisions are issued within 24–48 hours of complete documentation. Property verification adds 1–2 days.

items.q: Do I need to visit a branch?
items.a: No. Everything — application, document upload, and signing — is done digitally. Our field team visits you for property verification.
Directly to your registered bank account within 2 working days of signing the loan agreement.
Foreclosure is free after 6 months. Earlier closures attract up to 4% on outstanding principal.
Yes — one part-payment per quarter is free of charge.
No. We follow full rate-card transparency under the RBI Fair Practice Code. All charges are listed in your sanction letter before you sign.

sections.title: Didn't find your answer?
sections.subtitle: Our team responds within one business day. Or call us for a faster answer.
